message:
fix(cask): escape double quotes in caveats block (#98)

The Homebrew cask caveats contained unescaped double quotes inside
double-quoted Ruby strings, breaking `brew install --cask ntm`.
Escape the inner quotes so GoReleaser generates valid Ruby.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -189,10 +189,10 @@ homebrew_casks:
       To complete installation, add the following to your shell config:
 
         # For zsh (add to ~/.zshrc):
-        eval "$(ntm init zsh)"
+        eval \"$(ntm init zsh)\"
 
         # For bash (add to ~/.bashrc):
-        eval "$(ntm init bash)"
+        eval \"$(ntm init bash)\"
 
       Run 'ntm tutorial' to get started!
